name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-smop

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-smop
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Smop SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Smop SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-smop
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common smop
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.AccountId
documentation:
用户唯一标识，最大长度为64
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.DeviceId
documentation:
用户设备ID，最大长度为64
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.OrderId
documentation:
任务的唯一订单号，只能是数字、大小写字母，且在同一个产品ID下唯一，最大长度为64
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.Code
documentation:
任务事件Code，在腾讯安心用户运营平台下的任务事件列表中设置并获取
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.Async
documentation:
任务结果是否异步通知。0表示任务结果在返回信息中同步返回；1表示任务结果通过回调结果异步通知。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.ProductId
documentation:
产品ID，可在腾讯安心用户运营平台的企业管理中获取
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.smop.v20201203.models.SubmitTaskEventRequest.NotifyURL
documentation:
异步接收任务结果通知的回调地址。在Async为1的时候，会将任务结果通过该回调地址进行通知。
\:rtype: str
SubmitTaskEvent请求参数结构体
